LanguageData.UMF.Settings.MoodEffectsEnabledTooltip: If off, the mod still randomizes flavors per save and shows them on the inspect string of meat stacks, but eating meat won't add any flavor mood thought. Cosmetic-only mode.
LanguageData.UMF.Settings.RerollConfirmText: This will reassign every meat flavor in the current save. Existing flavor mood thoughts on colonists are not removed, but new ones will use the new assignments. Continue?
LanguageData.UMF.Settings.RerollNoGame: Load a save first to re-roll its flavor assignments.
